title: Construct clean convergence branch
description: Create a separate clean worktree and convergence branch from origin/main. Apply all integrate-classified logical slices in dependency order, resolve overlaps deliberately, preserve test integrity, and record any changed dispositions discovered during conflict resolution.
acceptance_criteria: The branch contains every integrate-classified commit or an equivalent reviewed resolution, excludes superseded/dropped commits and generated machine artifacts, has no unresolved conflicts, and passes focused gates after each conflict-bearing subsystem.
